cpu_summary: 2017 Kaby Lake-R quad-core / 8 threads, 15 W; first ULV quad-core generation; ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 6 (20KH) class; bridges the 2016 i7-7500u and the 2022 i7-1255u in our laptop roster.
quant_kernel_note: No AVX-VNNI: ggml int8 dot products use the AVX2 fallback. Quantisation produces zero throughput gain over fp16 on this host (sometimes uses slightly more user-time CPU than fp16); only RSS reductions are real. Build also requires GGML_NATIVE=OFF GGML_AVX_VNNI=OFF when cross-compiled from a VNNI-capable host to avoid SIGILL.
gpu: 00:02.0 VGA compatible controller [0300]: Intel Corporation Kaby Lake-R GT2 [UHD Graphics 620] (rev 07)
power_profile: default Ubuntu 26.04 governor (no TLP); AC, balanced

toolchain.source: cross-shipped from i7-1255u dev host (glibc 2.42); runs against Ubuntu 26.04 glibc 2.43

gpu_build.reason: Intel UHD 620 (gen 9.5 Kaby Lake GT2). Same GPU family as the i7-7500u host where whisper-rs 0.16.0 + current whisper.cpp upstream failed at link time (missing ggml_backend_vk_* symbols). No remote rust toolchain present and the live-system rootfs has ~6.7 GiB free, which would not accommodate a from-scratch toolchain + whisper.cpp build.
